lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: What human need help with?

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Make [sword style] sword.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's my current commission?

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Go make [sword style] sword.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm not sure what something does.

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: What do not understand, little one?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I use the crucible?

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Crucible just a big bucket... We put metal in and it melt it down to make swords.

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Crucible let us add differing metals... and can store up to 28 metal bar worth, Kovac think.

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: We can put other metal thing in too, like sword and armour.

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Need help with anything else?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What does the mould jig do?

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Mould jig very handy... It let us make differing type of sword.

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: We want use mould parts to fit condi... commission... so when setting up mould, find parts that match.

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Some match commission better than other... so find best one for job.

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Need help with anything else?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I control the preform's temperature?

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: That very easy... If preform too cold, dunk in lava... If preform too hot, hold to waterfall.

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Preform need to be right temperature to work with tool.

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Trip hammer need preform to be hot... Grindstone need preform to be warm... Polishing wheel need preform to be cold.

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Need help with anything else?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: When should I use a tool?

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Hmm... Kovac think it a gut feeling thing...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That doesn't help me.

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Hmm... that is true.

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Need help with anything else?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, I'm okay for now.

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I scrap my current commission?

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Why want that?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't think I'm really feeling it at the moment.

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: That okay, Kovac will give reward even if sword bad. Maybe you put in storage for working later, but Kovac no scrap swords.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to buy something.

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Here's what Kovac have.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm okay for now.

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Okay friend, Kovac here to help.

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: You no sword to hand over. I give new commission if want?

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Make [sword style] sword.

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: You no sword to hand over. Kovac give commission already. Go make me [sword style] sword.

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Hmm... sword not finished yet. Keep working.

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Hmm... sword look good. Hand over.

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Make [sword style] sword.

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Sword no good. Give it here.

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Make [sword style] sword.

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Kovac give commission already. Go make me [sword style] sword.

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: Kovac does not want that back. Maybe the smith clothes would be good, if you got any.

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: No, you keep that or give it to someone else.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can't you make an exception for me? I'm an Ironman by the way.

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: You get treated the same anyway.

lines.speaker: Kovac
lines.text: You keep that.
